Registry / Terms / audit trail

audit trail

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01395 · 11 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 10 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102008OIML D 31:2008
#02169
3.1.2
continuous data file containing a time stamped information record of events, e.g. changes in the values of the parameters of a device or software updates, or other activities that are legally relevant and which may influence the metrological characteristics
pending
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01395
T.4.5.9
historical record (or continuous data file) of the instrument data, adjustments and weighing operations. Checks can be made to ensure that adjustments and weighings have been carried out in accordance with the appropriate parts of this Recommendation. Every log entry has a unique time and date stamp
pending

#02061
T.1.18
set of electronic and/or paper records that provide for a complete The required records may include volumes at examination of measured variables, parameter settings and met calculation results to check the accuracy of a measurement and and cal any necessary corrections spe ene and

continuous data file containing a time stamped information record of events, e.g. changes in the values of the parameters of a measuring instrument or software updates, or other activities that are legally relevant and which may influence the mettrological

202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01395
T.4.5.9
historical record (or continuous data file) of the instrument data, adjustments and weighing operations. Checks can be made to ensure that adjustments and weighings have been carried out in accordance with the appropriate parts of this Recommendation. Every log entry has a unique time and date stamp

set of electronic and/or paper records that provide for a complete examination of measured variables, parameter settings and calculation results to check the accuracy of a measurement and any necessary corrections
